info.title: Dream Interpretation API
info.description:
Dream interpretation API + MCP for AI agents and developers. 2,000+ dream symbols with psychological meanings covering animals, objects, emotions, people, scenarios, and abstract concepts. Decode falling dreams, flying dreams, teeth falling out, being chased, water, snakes, and more. Search, browse A-Z, or discover random symbols. Build dream journal apps, AI dream analysis chatbots, sleep tracking features, and wellness platforms. Part of RoxyAPI multi-domain spiritual intelligence.

# RoxyAPI: AI-Native Insight Infrastructure

> **Base URL:** `https://roxyapi.com/api/v2`
> All endpoint paths below are relative to this base URL.

The only multi-domain spiritual intelligence API. 9 domains (astrology, tarot, numerology, crystals, dreams, I-Ching, angel numbers, Vedic astrology, location), 122+ endpoints, one API key, instant activation. Native MCP support for AI agents.

## Who uses RoxyAPI

- **Developers** building astrology apps, tarot platforms, numerology calculators, or dream journals
- **AI agent builders** connecting Claude, GPT, or Gemini to real calculation engines via MCP
- **Vibe coders** shipping insight apps with Cursor, Bolt, or Replit using zero domain knowledge
- **Founders and brands** launching branded spiritual experiences for their audience

## Quick start (60 seconds)

**1. Get your API key** at [roxyapi.com/pricing](https://roxyapi.com/pricing). Instant delivery, no account required.

**2. Make your first call:**
```bash
curl -H "X-API-Key: YOUR_KEY" https://roxyapi.com/api/v2/tarot/draw -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"count": 3}'
```

**3. Monitor usage:**
```bash
curl -H "X-API-Key: YOUR_KEY" https://roxyapi.com/api/v2/usage
```

## AI agent integration (MCP)

RoxyAPI has native Model Context Protocol support. Your AI agent auto-discovers all 122+ endpoints as callable tools with zero configuration:
- **Claude Desktop, Cursor, Windsurf**: Add MCP server URL in settings
- **OpenAI Agents, Gemini ADK**: Connect via Streamable HTTP transport
- **Custom agents**: Use the MCP Python/TypeScript SDK

MCP endpoints: `https://roxyapi.com/mcp/{domain}` (e.g., `/mcp/astrology-api`, `/mcp/tarot-api`)

Setup guide: [roxyapi.com/docs/mcp](https://roxyapi.com/docs/mcp)

## Authentication

All endpoints require an API key via header or query param:
- **Header (recommended):** `X-API-Key: YOUR_KEY`
- **Query param (testing):** `?api_key=YOUR_KEY`

## Response format

Clean JSON, no wrapper objects. Errors return `{ "error": "message", "code": "error_code" }`. The `error` field is human-readable (may change wording). The `code` field is machine-readable (stable — safe to switch on programmatically).

Rate limit headers on every response: `X-RateLimit-Limit`, `X-RateLimit-Remaining`, `X-RateLimit-Used`

## Errors

All errors return `{ "error": "message", "code": "error_code" }`:

| Status | Code | When |
|--------|------|------|
| 400 | `validation_error` | Missing or invalid parameters |
| 401 | `api_key_required` | No API key provided |
| 401 | `invalid_api_key` | Key format invalid or tampered |
| 401 | `subscription_not_found` | Key references non-existent subscription |
| 401 | `subscription_inactive` | Subscription cancelled, expired, or suspended |
| 404 | `not_found` | Resource not found |
| 429 | `rate_limit_exceeded` | Monthly quota reached |
| 500 | `internal_error` | Server error |

## Pricing

Flat per-request pricing. Every call counts the same, whether a planet position or a full birth chart with aspects. No credit systems, no variable costs. Plans from $39 to $699/month.

See [roxyapi.com/pricing](https://roxyapi.com/pricing)

## Resources

- [Quickstart guide](https://roxyapi.com/docs/quickstart) - first API call in 60 seconds
- [Documentation](https://roxyapi.com/docs) - guides, tutorials, domain reference
- [MCP setup](https://roxyapi.com/docs/mcp) - connect AI agents
- [Starter apps](https://roxyapi.com/starters) - clone and deploy in 30 minutes
- [FAQ](https://roxyapi.com/faq) - common questions
- [Contact](https://roxyapi.com/contact) - support and API key recovery

tags.name: Dreams
tags.description: Dream interpretation API + MCP for AI agents and developers. 2,000+ dream symbols with psychological meanings covering animals, objects, emotions, people, scenarios, and abstract concepts. Decode falling dreams, flying dreams, teeth falling out, being chased, water, snakes, and more. Search, browse A-Z, or discover random symbols. Build dream journal apps, AI dream analysis chatbots, sleep tracking features, and wellness platforms. Part of RoxyAPI multi-domain spiritual intelligence.

apiKey.name: X-API-Key
apiKey.description: Your API key for accessing RoxyAPI. Alternatively, you can pass the API key as a query parameter "api_key".

name.description: Display name of the dream symbol.

id.description: Unique symbol identifier in kebab-case. Use this to fetch full interpretation via /symbols/{id}.

name.description: Display name of the dream symbol.

letter.description: Starting letter (a-z) for alphabetical dream dictionary navigation.

meaning.example: To see a snake in your dream signifies hidden fears and worries that are threatening you. Your dream may be alerting you to something in your waking life that you are not aware of or that has not yet surfaced.
meaning.description: Full psychological dream interpretation explaining the subconscious symbolism, emotional significance, and waking-life connections of this dream symbol.

get.description: Browse and search our complete dream interpretation dictionary containing 2,000+ dream symbols with psychological meanings. Find dream meanings for animals (snake dreams, spider dreams, dog dreams), common scenarios (falling dreams, flying dreams, being chased, drowning), people (dreams about mother, father, baby, ex), objects (car, house, water, fire), emotions (fear, anxiety, love), body parts (teeth falling out, hair, eyes), colors, numbers, and abstract concepts. Filter by starting letter for A-Z navigation or search by keyword to find what your dreams mean.

schema.description: Search query to match against symbol names and meanings. Case-insensitive.

parameters.description: Search query to match against symbol names and meanings. Case-insensitive.
parameters.name: q

schema.description: Filter symbols by starting letter (a-z). Case-insensitive.

parameters.description: Filter symbols by starting letter (a-z). Case-insensitive.
parameters.name: letter

schema.description: Maximum items to return per page. Range: 1-50, default 20.

parameters.description: Maximum items to return per page. Range: 1-50, default 20.
parameters.name: limit

schema.description: Number of items to skip for pagination. Default 0.

parameters.description: Number of items to skip for pagination. Default 0.
parameters.name: offset

200.description: Paginated list of dream symbols with basic information.

total.description: Total number of dream symbols matching your search or filter criteria.

limit.description: Page size used for this response.

offset.description: Number of symbols skipped. Use with limit for pagination.

symbols.description: Dream symbols for the current page. Use /symbols/{id} to get full interpretation.

error.description: Human-readable error message. May change wording.
Human-readable error message. May change wording.

get.description: Discover random dream symbols and their interpretations for daily dream insights and exploration. Each request returns different symbols from the 2,000+ dream meaning database - perfect for dream of the day features, dream journaling prompts, meditation on subconscious themes, or exploring what different dreams mean. Get one or multiple random dream interpretations with full psychological meanings.

schema.description: Number of random symbols to return (1-10). Default: 1.

parameters.description: Number of random symbols to return (1-10). Default: 1.
parameters.name: count

200.description: Random dream symbol(s) with full interpretations.

error.description: Human-readable error message. May change wording.
Human-readable error message. May change wording.
Human-readable error message. May change wording.
Human-readable error message. May change wording.

get.description: Get the count of dream symbols available for each letter A-Z. Build alphabetical dream dictionary navigation to help users browse dream interpretations by letter - from abandonment dreams to zodiac dreams. See how many dream meanings exist for each starting letter.

200.description: Symbol counts organized by starting letter.

letters.description: Map of starting letter to symbol count. Use to build A-Z dream dictionary navigation showing how many dream meanings exist per letter.

total.description: Total number of dream symbols in the complete dream interpretation database.

error.description: Human-readable error message. May change wording.
Human-readable error message. May change wording.

get.description: Get the complete dream interpretation for a specific symbol. Understand what your dream means with detailed psychological analysis covering subconscious symbolism, emotional significance, and connections to your waking life. Covers all major dream themes: snake dreams (hidden fears, transformation), falling dreams (loss of control, anxiety), water dreams (emotions, cleansing), death dreams (endings, transformation), teeth falling out (self-image, communication anxiety), being chased (avoidance, confronting fears), flying dreams (freedom, ambition), and thousands more dream meanings.

error.description: Human-readable error message. May change wording.
Human-readable error message. May change wording.
Human-readable error message. May change wording — do not parse programmatically.

code.description: Machine-readable error code. Stable identifier for programmatic error handling.

error.description: Human-readable error message. May change wording.
Human-readable error message. May change wording.

post.description: Receive a single dream symbol for daily reflection and subconscious exploration. Uses seeded randomness so the same seed gets the same symbol on the same day, perfect for "Dream Symbol of the Day" features. Provide a seed (userId, email hash, session token) for reproducible consistency, or omit for date-based daily symbols. Returns the symbol with full psychological interpretation. Great for dream journal apps, wellness platforms, morning ritual apps, and meditation tools.

seed.description: Optional seed for reproducible readings. Same seed + same date = same symbol every time. Pass any unique identifier (userId, email hash, session token). Omit for anonymous daily readings.

date.description: Date for the reading in YYYY-MM-DD format. Defaults to today (UTC). Useful for viewing past daily readings or pre-generating future ones.
Date of the daily dream symbol in YYYY-MM-DD format (UTC). Determines which symbol is selected for seeded readings.

seed.description: Seed used for this daily reading. Same seed on the same date always produces the identical symbol.

id.description: Unique symbol identifier in kebab-case. Use this to fetch full details via /symbols/{id}.

name.description: Display name of the dream symbol.

meaning.description: Full psychological dream interpretation explaining the subconscious symbolism, emotional significance, and waking-life connections.

dailyMessage.description: Concise daily message summarizing the dream symbol and its key themes for quick reflection.
